# Evolve Documentation

> A sovereign rollup framework that enables developers to build rollups on any Data Availability (DA) layer.

## Pages

- [Using Evolve `Node` as replacement of Tendermint `Node`](https://evolve.com/docs/adr/adr-001-node-interface)
- [Mempool](https://evolve.com/docs/adr/adr-002-mempool)
